requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz, Type G (BS 1363) Plug Standard
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230 V / 50 Hz，G型（BS 1363）插头标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230 V / 50 Hz，G型（BS 1363）插頭標準

summary.en: Zambia operates a 230 V / 50 Hz electrical system and uses the Type G (BS 1363) British three-pin plug as the standard socket type, a legacy of British colonial infrastructure. Power adapters, chargers, and mains-connected equipment must be designed or adapted for 230 V / 50 Hz and must be compatible with Type G sockets. Electrical product safety is governed by ZABS ZS standards (IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1-based for IT and audio-visual equipment). Products not meeting Zambian electrical safety standards may be rejected at customs or prohibited from sale.
summary.zh: 赞比亚采用230 V / 50 Hz电力系统，以G型（BS 1363）英式三脚插头为标准插座类型，这是英国殖民地基础设施的历史遗留。电源适配器、充电器及连接市电的设备须设计或改装以适配230 V / 50 Hz，且须兼容G型插座。电气产品安全受ZABS ZS标准（基于IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1，适用于IT及视听设备）约束。不符合赞比亚电气安全标准的产品可能在海关被拒或被禁止销售。
summary.zht: 尚比亞採用230 V / 50 Hz電力系統，以G型（BS 1363）英式三腳插頭為標準插座類型，這是英國殖民地基礎設施的歷史遺留。電源適配器、充電器及連接市電的設備須設計或改裝以適配230 V / 50 Hz，且須相容G型插座。電氣產品安全受ZABS ZS標準（基於IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1，適用於IT及視聽設備）約束。不符合尚比亞電氣安全標準的產品可能在海關被拒或被禁止銷售。

standards_or_laws: ZS IEC 62368-1 (or ZS IEC 60950-1) — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment: Safety requirements (Zambia)
BS 1363 — UK plug and socket standard (Type G, in use in Zambia)

summary.en: China operates a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical system and uses Type A/I (flat-pin) plugs (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002). CCC certification covers electrical safety for in-scope products under GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 based) or GB 4943.23 (IEC 62368-1 based). Chinese plugs and voltage labelling are incompatible with Zambian Type G sockets and may require physical adapters or rewiring for local sale.
summary.zh: 中国采用220 V / 50 Hz电力系统，使用A型/I型（平脚）插头（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。CCC认证依据GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）或GB 4943.23（基于IEC 62368-1）涵盖范围内产品的电气安全。中国插头及电压标识与赞比亚G型插座不兼容，本地销售可能需要物理转接器或重新接线。
summary.zht: 中國採用220 V / 50 Hz電力系統，使用A型/I型（平腳）插頭（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。CCC認證依據GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）或GB 4943.23（基於IEC 62368-1）涵蓋範圍內產品的電氣安全。中國插頭及電壓標識與尚比亞G型插座不相容，本地銷售可能需要物理轉接器或重新接線。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of Information Technology Equipment (China, IEC 60950-1 based)
GB 4943.23 — Safety of Audio/Video and IT Equipment (China, IEC 62368-1 based)
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 — Plugs and Sockets for Household and Similar Purposes (China)

gap.en: Zambia uses 230 V / 50 Hz and Type G (BS 1363) sockets; China uses 220 V / 50 Hz and Type A/I flat-pin plugs. Power adapters and mains-connected equipment sold in Zambia must be rated for 230 V and fitted with or compatible with Type G plugs. Chinese CCC electrical safety approval is not recognised by ZABS. Products must meet applicable ZABS ZS electrical safety standards. Physical plug incompatibility requires product adaptation for the Zambia market.
gap.zh: 赞比亚使用230 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插座；中国使用220 V / 50 Hz和A型/I型平脚插头。在赞比亚销售的电源适配器及连接市电的设备须额定230 V，并配备或兼容G型插头。中国CCC电气安全批准不被ZABS承认。产品须符合适用的ZABS ZS电气安全标准。插头物理不兼容性要求产品针对赞比亚市场进行适配。
gap.zht: 尚比亞使用230 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插座；中國使用220 V / 50 Hz和A型/I型平腳插頭。在尚比亞銷售的電源適配器及連接市電的設備須額定230 V，並配備或相容G型插頭。中國CCC電氣安全批准不被ZABS承認。產品須符合適用的ZABS ZS電氣安全標準。插頭物理不相容性要求產品針對尚比亞市場進行適配。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia uses 230 V / 50 Hz and Type G (BS 1363) plugs. Chinese power adapters and mains-connected equipment must be adapted for 230 V and Type G compatibility. Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Zambia; compliance with ZABS ZS electrical safety standards is required. Verification with ZABS is recommended before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚使用230 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插头。中国电源适配器及连接市电的设备须适配230 V并兼容G型插头。中国CCC电气安全认证在赞比亚不被承认；须符合ZABS ZS电气安全标准。建议在进入市场前向ZABS进行核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞使用230 V / 50 Hz和G型（BS 1363）插頭。中國電源適配器及連接市電的設備須適配230 V並相容G型插頭。中國CCC電氣安全認證在尚比亞不被承認；須符合ZABS ZS電氣安全標準。建議在進入市場前向ZABS進行核實。
